recommendations.title: Torrente 4: Lethal crisis
recommendations.overview: The rude, lewd and crude Spanish ex-police officer Torrente finds himself facing jail time. Can he survive a twisted irony that places him where he has put so many others, both guilty and innocent?

recommendations.title: Torrente: The Dumb Arm of the Law
recommendations.overview: A former policeman enlists his nerdy friend to help bust drug traffickers moving heroin through a Chinese restaurant.

recommendations.title: Father There Is Only One 2
recommendations.overview: The success of the Conchy virtual assistant (which was developed by Javier) has earned him a favorable spot in the parents chat room - until something unexpected ruins it all.

recommendations.title: Torrente 2: Mission in Marbella

recommendations.title: Torrente 3: The Protector
recommendations.overview: A popular and beautiful politician plans to expose the evil-doings of a multinational corporation. Hoping to silence her, the corporation's top executives decide to hire the most incompetent detective they can find to act as her bodyguard.
